infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: IrrigoPro uses the camera to attach photos to wet check zones and billing sheets.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: IrrigoPro accesses your photo library to attach existing photos to wet checks and billing sheets.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: IrrigoPro saves photos you capture to your photo library so you have a personal copy.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: IrrigoPro records your location when you save a billing sheet so the office can verify the work site.

plugins.cameraPermission: IrrigoPro uses the camera to attach photos to wet check zones and billing sheets.
plugins.photosPermission: IrrigoPro accesses your photo library to attach existing photos to wet checks and billing sheets.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: IrrigoPro records your location when you save a billing sheet so the office can verify the work site.
